description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-neon that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-latest job in a kdeneon/plasma:user container, and perform a series of steps to prepare the environment, checkout the code, install dependencies, prepare the build directory, run cmake, make, and install the build, and finally send a notification to an IRC channel on success or failure.
